channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Titans fire GM Ran Carthon after two seasons despite big spending spree
item.description: The Tennessee Titans fired general manager Ran Carthon after just two seasons on the job and a 9-25 record.
item.dc:creator: Teresa M. Walker, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Syracuse QB Kyle McCord's 5 TD passes earn him a spot on AP's all-bowl team
item.description: The expansion of the College Football Playoff has led to an evolution in how The Associated Press puts together its all-bowl team. It didn’t make much sense to measure players who competed in one bowl game against guys who were participating in as many as four playoff contests.
item.dc:creator: STEVE MEGARGEE, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Packers take huge hit on offense before playoffs as star wide receiver suffers knee injury
item.description: Green Bay Packers star wide receiver Christian Watson tore his ACL in the the teams 24-22 loss to the Chicago Bears on Sunday, delivering a big blow to the Packers offense.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: NFL coaching searches have complicated rules about timing and interviews
item.description: The overlap of the NFL playoffs and coaching search season will have many of the league's top assistants pulling double duty this month.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Suns' Beal stars as a reserve in win over 76ers and makes it clear he believes he is an NBA starter
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — Bradley Beal made the most of the unfamiliar role of substitute for the Phoenix Suns. That doesn't mean he had to like it.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Mavericks guard Kyrie Irving out due to bulging disk in his back, no timeline for return
item.description: MEMPHIS, Tenn. (AP) — Dallas guard Kyrie Irving is expected to miss one to two weeks with a bulging disk in his back, and Mavericks coach Jason Kidd said a timeline for his return was not immediately known.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: North Dakota State wins 10th FCS title as Miller accounts for 4 TDs in 35-32 win over Montana State
item.description: Cam Miller ran for two touchdowns and threw for two more to lead North Dakota State to its record 10th Football Championship Subdivision title.
item.dc:creator: Stephen Hawkins, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Tennessee, nation's lone unbeaten, strengthens grip on No. 1; WVU, Michigan, Utah St enter AP Top 25
item.description: Tennessee tightened its grip on No. 1 in the AP Top 25 on Monday following a pair of lopsided wins, including one over SEC rival Arkansas, that left the Volunteers as the only undefeated team in men's Division I college basketball.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: NFL coaching moves: Mayo, Pederson are out of a job while Giants elect to keep Daboll
item.description: New England's Jerod Mayo and Jacksonville's Doug Pederson are two NFL coaches who are out of a job, though a handful of other teams decided to stay with the status quo on a surprisingly quiet Monday following the regular season.
item.dc:creator: DAVID BRANDT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Tough, old school defense a calling card for all four teams left in the national championship hunt
item.description: AUSTIN, Texas (AP) — The expanded College Football Playoff has a decidedly old-school feel: Smothering defenses have carried the last four teams still in the hunt for the national championship. If you want offense, look elsewhere this weekend.
item.dc:creator: JIM VERTUNO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Castroneves to attempt to qualify for Daytona 500, would be NASCAR debut for 4-time Indy 500 winner
item.description: CHARLOTTE, N.C. (AP) — Four-time Indianapolis 500 winner Helio Castroneves will attempt to make his NASCAR debut in next month's Daytona 500 with Trackhouse Racing.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ohio State QB Will Howard gets one more chance against old nemesis Texas, this time in CFP semifinal
item.description: COLUMBUS, Ohio (AP) — Second chances are not easy to come by. One victory over Texas in the College Football Playoff semifinals would more than make up for years of frustration for Ohio State quarterback Will Howard.
item.dc:creator: NOAH WEISKOPF, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Rays 'expect' city to repair Tropicana Field by Opening Day 2026
item.description: Tampa Bay Rays leaders now say they "support and expect" the City of St. Petersburg to repair hurricane-damaged Tropicana Field by Opening Day of the 2026 season.
item.dc:creator: Rachel Tucker, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Rob Gronkowski rips Patriots' decision to fire Jerod Mayo after 1 season
item.description: Former New England Patriots star Rob Gronkowski ripped the organization's decision to fire head coach Jerod Mayo after one season at the helm.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Jahmyr Gibbs tallies 4 touchdowns as Lions take down Vikings to win NFC North, secure No. 1 seed in playoffs
item.description: The NFC North goes to the Detroit Lions, as they took down the Minnesota Vikings to win the division title and be named the No. 1 seed in the playoffs.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Jimmy Butler wants to leave the Heat. Pat Riley has been in this spot many times before
item.description: MIAMI (AP) — Pat Riley turns 80 in a couple of months. The Miami Heat president has not revealed any retirement timetable. He still wears impeccable suits, shakes hands with as firm of a grip as anyone, knows all eyes are on him when he walks into just about any room. He's not stopping.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Tampa Bay Buccaneers secure playoff win: Fans celebrate victory
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (WFLA) — With the Bucs clinching a playoff spot, fans are fired up as they look ahead to the next steps in their postseason journey. It was a rough start for fans cheering on the Tampa Bay Buccaneers against the New Orleans Saints on the opening drives.
item.dc:creator: WFLA, NBC

item.title: Broncos clinch playoffs after 38-0 win over Chiefs
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX) — They say, "It ain't how you start; it's how you finish." For the Denver Broncos, their season finale had it all—high stakes, playoff hopes, and a shot at redemption against a Kansas City Chiefs team resting most of its stars.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Browns fire offensive coordinator Ken Dorsey and O-line coach Andy Dickerson after 3-14 season
item.description: Hours after finishing 3-14 with a loss in the finale of a season that was expected to carry into the playoffs, Cleveland coach Kevin Stefanski fired offensive coordinator Ken Dorsey and offensive line coach Andy Dickerson.
item.dc:creator: TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Utah HC falls in overtime to Dallas, 3-2
item.description: DALLAS (AP) - Thomas Harley scored 3:01 into overtime to give the Dallas Stars their fourth straight win, 3-2 against the Utah Hockey Club at American Airlines Center on Saturday. Matt Duchene found Harley near the right post after collecting his own rebound in front of the net.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Red Rocks cruise past Utah State in season opener
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The fifth-ranked Utah gymnastics team kicked off its 50th anniversary season in style, overcoming a slow start to eventually secure a dominant victory over Utah State Friday night at the Huntsman Center.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Utah HC storms back at Calgary to end five-game skid
item.description: CALGARY (ABC4 Sports) - Lawson Crouse scored twice, and the Utah Hockey Club rallied for a 5-3 win against the Calgary Flames at Scotiabank Saddledome on Thursday to end a five-game losing skid.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: UIC men's basketball team scores huge win by knocking mid-major power Drake from ranks of unbeaten
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — The Drake men's basketball team walked into Credit Union 1 Arena on Chicago's Near West Side on New Year's Day with no losses this season. They exited with one, courtesy of the University of Illinois Chicago.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: With chance for 3rd straight win, Bulls fall on road to woeful Wizards, 125-107
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — After winning two games in a row to close out 2024, the Bulls seemingly had a great opportunity to kick off 2025 with a third straight victory when they visited the nation's capital on Wednesday night to face the woeful Wizards. Things certainly didn't go as planned for Chicago.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Gauff and Fritz put US in United Cup semifinals. Kazakhstan beats Germany to advance
item.description: Coco Gauff and Taylor Fritz powered the U.S., tournament winner two years ago, into the semifinals of the United Cup mixed teams tennis event on Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Aggies improve to 13-1 after 69-64 win over Nevada
item.description: RENO, Nev. (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah State men's basketball (13-1, 3-0 MW) closed out 2024 with a victory, wrapping up an undefeated three-game road trip with a 69-64 win over Nevada at the Lawlor Event Center.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Utes blown out in Big 12 opener by Baylor, 81-56
item.description: WACO, Tex. (AP) - It was a rude awakening to the Big 12 Conference for the Runnin' Utes. V.J. Edgecombe scored 19 points, three other Baylor players had 15 and the 25th-ranked Bears led throughout in an 81-56 win over Utah on Tuesday in the Big 12 opener for both teams.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Holiday Classic: Father Judge 80, Carlsbad 70
item.description: In the Third-Place game for the National Bracket of the 2024 Holiday Classic, Father Judge High School from Philadelphia, PA defeats Carlsbad 80-70.
item.dc:creator: Chase Izidoro, Fox 5

item.title: Holiday Classic: Lincoln Stockton 64, Mission Bay 45
item.description: In the American Bracket Championship Game of the 2024 Holiday Classic, Lincoln High School from Stockton, CA defeated Mission Bay 64-45.
item.dc:creator: Chase Izidoro, Fox 5

item.title: Bears plan to start Caleb Williams, other healthy starters for season finale at Green Bay
item.description: LAKE FOREST, Ill. (AP) — The Bears plan to have Caleb Williams make one more start rather than hold their prized rookie quarterback out of the season finale at Green Bay.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9
